title: Graceful Session Timeout Handling with Token Refresh
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a friendly prompt when my session times out, so that I can continue working without seeing a raw error message or being unexpectedly logged out.
description:
When the Salesforce access token expires, the application was displaying a raw error message. The session timeout experience needed to be improved to handle token expiration gracefully.

## Implemented Behavior

When the access token expires and the user tries to fetch data from Salesforce:

1. A **popup modal** appears asking the user to continue or exit.
2. **Continue**: Sends a request for a new access token using the refresh token, updates the auth model, and redirects back to the dashboard.
3. **Exit**: Logs the user out and redirects to the login page.

This replaces the raw error display with a controlled, user-friendly flow.
acceptance_criteria: Expired access tokens trigger a popup modal instead of a raw error
Clicking 'Continue' refreshes the access token using the refresh token
User is redirected to the dashboard after successful token refresh
Clicking 'Exit' logs the user out and redirects to login
No raw error messages are displayed to the user during token expiration
ux_changes: Popup modal appears when access token expires, offering Continue (refresh) or Exit (logout) options. Replaces raw error display.
middleware_changes: Token refresh logic implemented: when access token expires, the refresh token is used to obtain a new access token. The auth model is updated with the new token.
api_changes: New endpoint or logic to exchange refresh token for a new access token from Salesforce OAuth.
implementation_notes: The access token from Salesforce expires after a set period. Previously, attempting to use an expired token resulted in a raw error. Now the middleware detects the expired token, presents a modal, and on 'Continue' uses the refresh token to get a new access token. The auth token model is updated and the user is redirected to the dashboard.
comment_summary: Developer explained the root cause: access tokens expire and refresh token exchange was not previously implemented. Built a popup modal with Continue/Exit options and token refresh logic. Product owner confirmed the fix resolved the issue.
